summary: Frontend-only testing for fullscreen task creation pages. All 5 requested features verified working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844).
passed_tests: Feature 1: Navigate to /task/new from Dashboard FAB - fullscreen page with back arrow, title 'нове завдання'
Feature 2: Navigate to /smm/task/new from SMM page FAB - fullscreen page with back arrow, title 'нове smm завдання'
Feature 3: Create task from /task/new - success toast shown, navigates back to Dashboard after creation
Feature 4: Create SMM task from /smm/task/new - success toast shown, navigates back to SMM page after creation
Feature 5: Both task pages have same style as /event/new - fullscreen layout, header with back arrow, centered title, same background color
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks: 'Тестове завдання T1 flow', 'Final Test Task', 'Final SMM Test Task'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Popup dialogs replaced with fullscreen pages as requested. NewTaskPage route at /task/new, NewSMMTaskPage route at /smm/task/new. Both pages use page-header-back styling with ArrowLeft icon, centered title, and min-h-screen class for fullscreen effect. Task creation via api.createStandaloneTask() with navigate(-1) for back navigation. Event creation page uses fullscreen-modal class with additional X close button - minor style difference but visually consistent.

style_comparison_notes.event_creation_page: Uses fullscreen-modal class with back arrow (left) + X button (right) + centered title
style_comparison_notes.task_creation_pages: Use page-header-back class with back arrow (left) + placeholder div (right) + centered title
style_comparison_notes.visual_consistency: Both have same background (#F5F5F0), similar header styling, fullscreen layout. Minor difference: event page has X button, task pages don't
